verse_text: Rather, O Lord, let Your ear be attentive to the prayer of Your servant and to the prayer of Your servants who desire to fear Your name; and let Your servant prosper today, I pray, and grant him mercy in the sight of this man.' (For I was cupbearer to the king.)

links.context: This begins the prayer of Nehemiah (1:24-2:18). See also [[NEH.1:5]]-11.
